title: Review: code review findings from pre-merge audit
notes:
Maintainer risk: HIGH — 6 P0 correctness bugs, 3 of which involve wrong error semantics on write paths and 2 involve zeroization violations. Not bikeshedding.
Confidence: 15% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: aws-kms RSA-PSS MessageType interaction not verified against live KMS; pkcs11 RO-session-for-sign behavior is token-vendor-specific and only tested against SoftHSM2; wolfhsm stub behavior post-real-implementation unknown. Would raise confidence if: live aws-kms RSA-PSS test run; real hardware PKCS#11 token test; wolfhsm real implementation reviewed.
